styling_tips.desc: Maxton Design V2 for a lower, sharper nose line.
Gloss black extensions to match the front splitter.
TCR or Oettinger style to fit quad exhaust tips (for R model).
Racingline or Clubsport style wing extension.
19-inch Pretoria or aftermarket BBS CH-R for perfect wheel arch filling.
Bilstein B16 Coilovers for 30mm drop and track handling.
